hs_code.description: Laptop computers HS code per customs agreement CA-2024-GT

incoterms.description: Cost, Insurance, Freight — required per contract clause 4.2

consignee_name.description: Consignee must include the GlobalTech legal entity name

port_of_loading.description: Origin port per trade lane agreement TL-2024-007

port_of_discharge.description: Destination port per routing instruction RI-44

shipment_mode.description: Ocean freight only — air shipments require prior written approval

origin_country.description: Goods must originate from China per supplier agreement SA-CN-009

invoice_number.description: Invoice number must use the agreed INV- prefix per billing procedure BP-GT-003
